id.description: User ID, serves as the primary key.

messages.description: An array of message objects from the user. Each object contains text, audioUrl, timestamp, and voice.

username.description: Username of the sender if author is 'user'.

text.description: The text content of the message.

audio_urls.description: An array of audio URLs for the message.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the message was created.

database.instructions: Each user has a single row in the 'chat_histories' table, identified by their user ID. The 'messages' column contains a JSON array of all chat snippets they've generated. The `realtime_chat_messages` table contains the shared history for the public chat room. To get a random set of snippets for the AI, you can query the 'chat_histories' table and sample rows.
